name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: If Democrats Were Shrewd...
body:
**If Democrats Were Shrewd...**
_They’d divide and conquer, splitting Trump and his populist base from more conventional Republicans._

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|

_ILLUSTRATION: BARBARA KELLEY_
---
House Democrats can begin using their “subpoena cannon” in January to investigate and harass the White House, hoping to convince the nation of President Trump’s unfitness for office—though it is hard to imagine what they could possibly unearth that would be more damaging than what is already known. Alternately, they could try to abolish U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and replace private health insurance with government coverage, convincing not one new voter (or the Senate) to join them. A more effective strategy would be for House Democrats to take Mr. Trump’s populist campaign rhetoric seriously and seek to divide him from his more conventional Republican colleagues on the Hill.

As candidate and as president, Mr. Trump repeatedly claimed his tax reforms would not benefit the wealthy, and railed against big Wall Street banks and tech giants. Populist Democrats can help the president make good on his promises—and make Republicans shriek—by proposing a financial-transaction tax and a revenue tax on tech companies. They’d be following Europe’s lead. Democrats can force the issue by ending the carried-interest tax break, another of Mr. Trump’s campaign promises.

That new revenue would reduce annual deficits and make a down payment on another Trump campaign promise: eliminating the nation’s debt in eight years. Contrasting themselves with supposed small-government congressional Republicans, who presided over a $779 billion budget deficit during the last fiscal year, Democrats can be the party of fiscal responsibility, expanding government while reducing the deficit. There is no law mandating they spend all the new revenue they raise.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=14794&l=203&ctl=410AE:C15079EF2606CA7C226AA230D29B074E696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C226AA230D29B074E696548644412C47B)

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: These are not "great things"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd2/622b7b5b/1e7245a6/307b7680/3363480563/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190103a")
---
Thanks to Trump's shutdown, hundreds of thousands of federal workers are sitting home -- or working without pay.
The Violence Against Women Act lapsed, threatening future funds for domestic violence programs.
Everglades National Park staff and some public facilities, including public restrooms, are closed.
I'm not sure President Trump knows what the word "great" means if he thinks these are "great things" for our country.
[**But here is what you can do. Demand Trump end this shutdown and get people back to work.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd2/622b7b5b/1e7245a6/307b7680/3363480563/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190103a")
Shutting down half the federal government isn't responsible leadership. It's a temper tantrum.
Now that the House is back in Democratic hands, we can fight against Trump's ridiculous demands. We can ensure we have real border security instead of wasting billions of dollars on a border wall that won't work. And we will.
But first and foremost, my concern is doing what's best for families in Florida. Right now, thousands of people don't know when they'll see their next paycheck. They don't know when they'll be able to pay their bills. To me, that's unacceptable.
[**It's time for the #TrumpShutdown to end. If you agree, add your name.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd2/622b7b5b/1e7245a6/307b7680/3363480563/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190103a")
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd2/622b7b5b/1e7245a6/307b7683/3363480563/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?M=C5=A9thoni_Wambu_Kraal=2C_EMILY=27s_List?=
subject: FWD: Want to run for office, Peter? We're coming to Washington, D.C.!
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af5e/1728548912/VEsH/ "http://emilyslist.org/run-to-win?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")
---

Peter,

Applications are closing soon for our Run to Win 101 training on Sunday, January 20th in Washington D.C.

If you're thinking about running for office for the first time, this training is for you!

**There are only a few spots left, so make sure to apply soon:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Apply-For-Run-To-Win-DC](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af5f/1728548912/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20181204_email_RunToWinDC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgApplyForRunToWin&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")**

Hope to see you there,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

P.S. Know a woman who should think about running for office? Forward this email to her and ask her to apply, too!

_\----------Original Message----------
From: Mũthoni Wambu Kraal, EMILY's List
Sent: Mon, Dec 10, 2018_

Peter,

Run to Win is coming to Washington, D.C.!

In less than a month, my team and I will be in Washington, D.C. to train women on the basics of running for office. And we want you to join us!

The passion that drives you to protest or advocate for an issue is the same passion that drives people to run for office. It all comes down to wanting to make the world a better place.

Run to Win 101 is a free, introductory training for pro-choice Democratic women thinking about running for office.

**[Apply to attend our Run to Win 101 training in Washington, D.C.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af58/1728548912/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20181204_email_RunToWinDC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Apply+to+attend+our+Run+to+Win+101+train&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")**
**WHEN:**
Sunday, January 20th, 2019
8:30 a.m. -- 2:30 p.m.

**WHERE:**
Washington, D.C.
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af59/1728548912/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20181204_email_RunToWinDC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")
You don't need to be a declared candidate or even actively planning to run to attend. You just have to have an interest in advocacy and passion for creating positive change.

Space is limited and seats are being offered on a first-come, first-served basis.

**Submit your application to attend the training on Sunday, January 20th, 2019:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Apply-For-Run-To-Win-DC](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af5a/1728548912/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20181204_email_RunToWinDC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgApplyForRunToWin&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")**

Hope to see you there,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

P.S. Can't make the training but know someone who might be interested? Forward this email to them!

| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca029/24c69fd9/2fc1b989d/18b0af5b/1728548912/VEsA/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker&source=WRENE109_digital_email_20190104_RtWDCTrainingKicker")
---

# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
